title: COP 4020 – Programming Languages
text: 3/29/26, 12.21 AM COP 4020 Programming Languages University of South Florida COP 4020 Programming Languages Credit(s): 3 An introduction to the specification; design, and analysis of programming languages. Topics include syntax; operational semantics, type systems, type safety, lambda calculus, functional programming; polymorphism; side effects, and objects Prerequisite(s): CQP 4530 https Ilcatalog usf edulpreview course_nopop php?catoid-23&coid-103467&print 1/1
